Chemical Engineering, one of the four basic engineering fields, has an important place in the infrastructure of today's technological developments.

The Chemical Engineering Laboratory works to equip graduates who are equipped with the knowledge and skills to work in engineering fields, who are responsible to society, with the ability to think analytically and to gain the skills to solve problems.

Üsküdar University provides undergraduate and graduate education with a curriculum that includes laboratory studies. From the beginning of undergraduate education, experiments for important and frequently used applications in chemistry, chemical engineering and similar engineering fields are carried out by students in analytical chemistry, organic chemistry, instrumental analysis and chemical engineering laboratories using devices equipped with modern technology.

Graduates of Üsküdar University Department of Chemical Engineering are well-equipped in terms of laboratory experience and are qualified to work in research, development and quality control laboratories of all kinds of enterprises and to be responsible managers of these units.
